target_en: As soon as I saw the space, I made a run.
allowed_variations: As soon as I spotted the space I made a run,The moment I saw the space I made a run
focus_point: as soon as + 즉각 반응 표현
coach_note: 공간을 보고 즉시 움직이는 상황에서 쓰는 표현

prompt_kr: 공을 잃자마자 바로 다시 따내려 했어
target_en: As soon as we lost the ball, we tried to win it back.
allowed_variations: As soon as we lost it we tried to win it back,The moment we lost the ball we tried to win it back
focus_point: as soon as + 즉각 전환 압박
coach_note: 수비 전환 시 즉각 대응을 설명하는 표현

target_en: We need to look after the ball better.
allowed_variations: We need to take better care of the ball,We have to look after the ball better
coach_note: 온피치에서 볼 소유 강조할 때 쓰는 표현

prompt_kr: 동점골 허용하고도 포기 안 하고 다시 싸웠어
target_en: When they got the equalizer, we came back fighting.
allowed_variations: When they equalised we came back fighting,After they got the equalizer we kept fighting
coach_note: 인터뷰에서 팀의 멘탈을 보여주는 핵심 표현

target_en: We stayed focused until the end.
allowed_variations: We kept our focus until the end,We remained focused until the final whistle
coach_note: 경기 마무리 관련 인터뷰에서 자주 나오는 표현

prompt_kr: 10분 지나고 안정되면서 해볼 수 있겠다 싶었어
target_en: After 10 minutes, we settled down and felt like we could have a go.
allowed_variations: After the first 10 minutes we settled and felt we could have a go,Once we settled down we thought we could have a go
coach_note: 경기 흐름 전환점을 설명하는 인터뷰 표현
